title: The Remembrance Of The Good
content:
The remembrance of the Good
    Keep us ever glad in mood.

    The remembrance of the Fair
    Makes a mortal rapture share.

    The remembrance of one's Love
    Blest Is, if it constant prove.

    The remembrance of the One
    Is the greatest joy that's known.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "The Remembrance Of The Good"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
